TestCase z8Change(TestCase t1) {
    TestCase follow_case = t1;
    // --- Memory handling code generated based on the rule ---
    double* follow_case_v = (double*)malloc(t1.n * sizeof(double));
    memcpy(follow_case_v, t1.v, t1.n * sizeof(double));
    follow_case.v = follow_case_v;
    // ------------------------------------
    
    // Defensive check to ensure there is at least one element before reversing
    if (follow_case.n > 0) {
        for (int i = 0; i < follow_case.n / 2; ++i) {
            double temp = follow_case.v[i];
            follow_case.v[i] = follow_case.v[follow_case.n - 1 - i];
            follow_case.v[follow_case.n - 1 - i] = temp;
        }
    }
    
    return follow_case;
}
